<summary>万户级任务分解已完成，已按协议输出结构化决策，等待系统推进至下一阶段。</summary>


万户级任务分解已按照 `[Institution SOP]` 和 `[Topology Contract]` 的要求完成，并输出了包含决策、摘要和千户级分配的结构化 JSON。此阶段的任务已完成，无需进一步的工具调用。系统应根据 `decision: "next"` 推进到 `mingghan_level_execute` 阶段。

mingghan_allocations: Mingghan 1: Image Input & OCR Preparation: Receive fixtures/media/menu.jpeg and prepare it for OCR processing.
Mingghan 2: Raw Text Extraction via OCR: Execute OCR on the prepared image to obtain all recognized text content.
Mingghan 3: Local Phone Number Pattern Identification: Scan the raw OCR text for common phone number formats and patterns.
Mingghan 4: Local Restaurant Name Extraction: Identify and extract the restaurant's name from the OCR text.
Mingghan 5: Local Address/Location Data Extraction: Identify and extract any physical address or location details from the OCR text.
Mingghan 6: Local Website/Email/Social Media Link Extraction: Identify and extract any website URLs, email addresses, or social media handles from the OCR text.
Mingghan 7: Initial Contact Information Filtering & Prioritization: Filter and rank the extracted contact information candidates based on likelihood and relevance.
Mingghan 8: Web Search for Restaurant Verification & Auxiliary Info: If a restaurant name was extracted, perform a web search to verify the restaurant and find additional contact details.
Mingghan 9: Cross-referencing and Validation of Contact Info: Compare locally extracted contact details with web search results for accuracy and consistency.
Mingghan 10: Final Contact Number Consolidation & Reporting: Consolidate the most reliable contact number(s) and prepare the final report.
risks: OCR accuracy limitations may lead to incomplete or incorrect text extraction.
Ambiguous or multiple contact numbers in the extracted text may require further disambiguation.
Inability to verify information via web search if the restaurant name is unclear or not found online.

agent_trace.summary: [执行中] 千户任务已分解为十个百户子任务，等待下级执行。

jaghun_allocations.task_name: 图像文件存在性与可读性验证
jaghun_allocations.description: 确认 'fixtures/media/menu.jpeg' 文件路径有效且文件可被系统读取。

jaghun_allocations.task_name: 全图OCR文本初次提取
jaghun_allocations.description: 对整个菜单图片进行首次OCR文本提取，获取所有可能的文本信息。

jaghun_allocations.task_name: OCR文本质量评估与初步清洗
jaghun_allocations.description: 评估初次提取文本的质量，并进行基础的去重、去除乱码和多余空白字符。

jaghun_allocations.task_name: 电话号码模式识别（国内）
jaghun_allocations.description: 在清洗后的文本中，识别并提取符合中国大陆电话号码格式的字符串（手机、座机）。

jaghun_allocations.task_name: 电话号码模式识别（国际及特殊）
jaghun_allocations.description: 在清洗后的文本中，识别并提取符合国际电话号码格式或特殊服务号码格式的字符串。

jaghun_allocations.task_name: 邮箱地址模式识别
jaghun_allocations.description: 在清洗后的文本中，识别并提取所有可能的邮箱地址，作为备用联系方式。

jaghun_allocations.task_name: 地址信息模式识别
jaghun_allocations.description: 在清洗后的文本中，识别并提取可能的餐厅地址信息，作为辅助验证。

jaghun_allocations.task_name: 关键词上下文关联分析
jaghun_allocations.description: 分析提取出的电话/邮箱/地址信息与“预订”、“联系”、“电话”、“预约”等关键词的距离和关联性，以判断其相关度。

jaghun_allocations.task_name: 最佳联系方式筛选与排序
jaghun_allocations.description: 根据模式识别结果和上下文关联分析，筛选出最可能是餐厅联系电话的号码，并进行排序。

jaghun_allocations.task_name: 最终联系信息格式化与输出准备
jaghun_allocations.description: 对筛选出的最佳联系电话进行标准化格式处理，准备提交给上级。

arban_allocations.title: OCR Image Segment 1
arban_allocations.description: Perform OCR on the top-left conceptual segment of the menu image (fixtures/media/menu.jpeg) to identify text content.

arban_allocations.title: OCR Image Segment 2
arban_allocations.description: Perform OCR on the top-right conceptual segment of the menu image (fixtures/media/menu.jpeg) to identify text content.

arban_allocations.title: OCR Image Segment 3
arban_allocations.description: Perform OCR on the bottom-left conceptual segment of the menu image (fixtures/media/menu.jpeg) to identify text content.

arban_allocations.title: OCR Image Segment 4
arban_allocations.description: Perform OCR on the bottom-right conceptual segment of the menu image (fixtures/media/menu.jpeg) to identify text content.

arban_allocations.title: Consolidate OCR Text
arban_allocations.description: Gather and combine all text extracted from the four image segments into a single document for further analysis.

arban_allocations.title: Extract Phone Numbers
arban_allocations.description: Analyze the consolidated text to identify and list all potential phone numbers for the restaurant.

arban_allocations.title: Extract Addresses
arban_allocations.description: Analyze the consolidated text to identify and list all potential physical addresses for the restaurant.

arban_allocations.title: Extract Websites/Emails
arban_allocations.description: Analyze the consolidated text to identify and list all potential website URLs or email addresses for the restaurant.

arban_allocations.title: Prioritize Contact Number
arban_allocations.description: Evaluate the extracted contact information and prioritize the most likely phone number for restaurant booking.

arban_allocations.title: Format Final Output
arban_allocations.description: Format the identified primary contact number for clear and concise presentation to the user.
